ts-sdk.description: TypeScript SDK (@arkade-os/sdk). Wallet, identity, VTXO ops, MuSig2, assets, delegation.

go-sdk.description: Go client library for Arkade wallets. Key management, send/receive, VTXO lifecycle, gRPC transport.

arkd.description: Arkade protocol server. Manages VTXOs, off-chain rounds, liquidity. Hexagonal architecture, gRPC/REST.

boltz-swap.description: TypeScript library for Boltz swaps in Arkade wallets. SwapManager, VHTLC support.

dotnet-sdk.description: .NET SDK (NArk). VTXO management, MuSig2 batch signing, intent transactions.

arkade-assets.description: UTXO-native asset protocol for fungible/non-fungible tokens on Arkade.

rust-sdk.description: Rust SDK for Arkade. Workspace with ark-core (types, addresses, VTXOs), ark-client (wallet, swaps, coin selection), ark-grpc/ark-rest transports.

fulmine.description: Lightning-Arkade swap daemon. VHTLC management, Boltz integration, delegate tasks, wallet operations.

noa.description: Developer CLI for inspecting Arkade primitives. Decodes addresses, scripts, taptrees, PSBTs with Ark extensions.

arkade-docs.description: Official Arkade docs site (Mintlify). Protocol concepts, arkd, wallet guides, contracts.
